---
title: "Accuracy Trends"
subtitle: "How accurate is your play over time?"
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))
con <- get_site_db()
player_moves <- load_site_player_moves(con)
games <- load_site_games(con)
```

## Overall Accuracy Trend

```{r accuracy-trend}
acc_trend <- calculate_accuracy_trend(player_moves, window_size = 10)

p <- acc_trend %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = game_num)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = accuracy), alpha = 0.3, size = 1, color = "#f0d9b5") +
  geom_line(aes(y = rolling_accuracy), color = "#2E86AB", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Accuracy Trend Over Time",
       subtitle = "Individual game accuracy (points) with rolling average (line)",
       x = "Game Number", y = "Accuracy (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100))

ggplotly(p) %>% dark_plotly()
```

## Accuracy by Time Control

```{r accuracy-by-tc}
tc_accuracy <- player_moves %>%
  filter(is_player_move, !is.na(centipawn_loss), !is.na(time_control_seconds)) %>%
  mutate(tc_category = classify_time_control(time_control_seconds)) %>%
  group_by(game_id, tc_category) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = calculate_accuracy(mean(centipawn_loss, na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(tc_category) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_accuracy = sd(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_games = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(n_games >= 2)

plot_ly(tc_accuracy, x = ~tc_category, y = ~mean_accuracy, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = c("Bullet" = "#F44336", "Blitz" = "#FF9800",
                                "Rapid" = "#4CAF50", "Classical" = "#2E86AB")[tc_accuracy$tc_category]),
        error_y = list(array = ~sd_accuracy, color = "#adb5bd"),
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>Accuracy: %{y:.1f}%<br>Games: %{customdata}<extra></extra>",
        customdata = ~n_games) %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Average Accuracy by Time Control", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Time Control", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Accuracy (%)", range = c(0, 100), gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd")
  )
```

## Accuracy Distribution

```{r accuracy-dist}
game_accuracy <- calculate_game_accuracy(player_moves %>% filter(is_player_move))

p <- game_accuracy %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(white_accuracy, black_accuracy), names_to = "color", values_to = "accuracy") %>%
  mutate(color = str_remove(color, "_accuracy") %>% str_to_title()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = accuracy, fill = color)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.7, position = "identity", color = NA) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("White" = "#f0d9b5", "Black" = "#b58863")) +
  labs(title = "Game Accuracy Distribution",
       subtitle = "Distribution of average accuracy per game by color",
       x = "Accuracy (%)", y = "Number of Games", fill = "Color") +
  theme(legend.position = "top")

ggplotly(p) %>% dark_plotly()
```

## Rating vs Accuracy

```{r rating-accuracy}
p <- acc_trend %>%
  filter(!is.na(player_rating)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = player_rating, y = accuracy)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, color = "#f0d9b5") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#2E86AB") +
  labs(title = "Rating vs Accuracy", subtitle = "Correlation between player rating and game accuracy",
       x = "Player Rating", y = "Accuracy (%)") +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100))

ggplotly(p) %>% dark_plotly()
```

```{r cleanup}
disconnect_db(con)
```
